metadata.lyrics:
[00:10.39] What's the sense in sharing this one and only life?
[00:13.96] Endin' up just another lost and lonely wife
[00:17.82] You'll count up the years, and they will be filled with tears
[00:25.93] Love only breaks up, to start over again
[00:29.85] You'll get the babies, but you won't have your man
[00:33.99] While he is busy loving every woman that he can, uh-huh
[00:41.35] I say, "I'm gonna leave," a hundred times a day
[00:45.79] It's easier said than done
[00:47.85] When you just can't break away (just can't break away)
[00:51.55] Oh, young hearts run free
[00:55.80] And never be hung up, hung up like my man and me, my man and me
[01:03.50] My man and me
[01:06.15] Whoa, young hearts, to yourself be true
[01:11.85] Don't be no fool when love really does love you, mm-hm
[01:19.51] Loves you
[01:24.34] It's high time now just one crack at life
[01:28.16] Who wants to live it in trouble and strife
[01:31.86] My mind must be free to learn all I can about me
[01:39.96] I'm gonna love me, for the rest of my days
[01:43.81] Encourage the babies every time they say
[01:47.87] "Self preservation is what's really going on today," yeah
[01:55.81] I say, "I'm gonna turn loose," a hundred times a day
[01:59.80] But how can I turn loose

[02:05.29] Oh, young hearts run free
